title: Opti-Basic Fabric
description: A basic optimisation modpack for Fabric. [1.20.1-1.21.11]
body:
# What Is Opti-Basic Fabric?
This is a modpack that I made to prioritise optimisation. It has some basic optimisation mods and is made for people that just want performance without much want for shaders or a better look.
## What's Inside
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
A config screen API
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
A mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
Culls leaf blocks
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)
Fixes some bugs on the Minecraft bug tracker
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
Reduces resource usage while Minecraft is idle
- [Enhanced Block Entities (v1.0.0-v1.0.10)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
Reduces FPS lag with block entities
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
Skips rendering things that you can't see
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
A library with essential hooks for fabric mods
- [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
Reduces the memory usage of Minecraft
- [Immediately Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
Speeds up immediate mode rendering
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod
- [Modern Fix (v1.0.0-v1.0.10) and replaced with [ModernFix-mVUS](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix-mvus)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
All-in-one mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
Changes how multiple types of culling are handled
- [Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium)
Improves client performance on large multiplayer servers
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
A modern rendering engine for Minecraft
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
Adds some optimisation features that aren't in sodium
- [Starlight (v1.0.0-v1.0.3)](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight)
Rewrites the lighting engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors
- [Yet Another Config Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
A configuration library for Minecraft
### Why Use Opti-Basic?
This mod is for performance. If you just want good performance with no shaders (but the option to add more later), then this mod is for you.

**Reviews**: This modpack is always progressing and it would be great if you could give some feedback! Please submit a ticket in the discord and give us feedback on anything we could do better in the future. All feedback is welcomed.
